text: There is a persistent feeling of quiet curiosity within me. The first scene’s vast emptiness and muted light elicits a sense of anticipation, as though I am standing in the wings of a theatre before a performance. The second scene, filled with language and the promise of discovery, pulses with the energy of ideas. I feel contemplative and slightly electrified, standing at the intersection of space and thought, eager to unravel the mysteries unfolding around me.
